findings.description: The source h2 section '使用方法' contains 3 h3-level subsections (BasicPermissionFactoryの設定方法, 特定のリクエストIDを認可判定の対象から除外する方法, 使用例) and is significantly larger than 2000 characters, but the knowledge file uses a single section (s1) without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: Source has 3 `===`-underlined subsections under the `---`-underlined '使用方法' section. Knowledge file maps all content to a single s1 section.

findings.description: Missing property name hints for BasicPermissionFactory table entries: `groupTableSchema`, `systemAccountTableSchema`, `groupSystemAccountTableSchema`, `permissionUnitTableSchema`, `permissionUnitRequestTableSchema`, `groupAuthorityTableSchema`, `systemAccountAuthorityTableSchema`. Also missing PascalCase class names: `SimpleDbTransactionManager` (referenced in dbManager property description and XML), `BasicBusinessDateProvider` (appears in XML configuration example).
findings.source_evidence: BasicPermissionFactoryのプロパティ table first column: groupTableSchema(必須), systemAccountTableSchema(必須), groupSystemAccountTableSchema(必須), permissionUnitTableSchema(必須), permissionUnitRequestTableSchema(必須), groupAuthorityTableSchema(必須), systemAccountAuthorityTableSchema(必須). XML: `<component class="nablarch.core.db.transaction.SimpleDbTransactionManager">`, `<component name="businessDateProvider" class="nablarch.core.date.BasicBusinessDateProvider" />`.
